why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:block_changed_ack must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a ClientboundBlockChangedAckPacket-compatible decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from block prediction semantics, client world correction behavior, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The Rust oracle test play_block_changed_ack_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer did not compile because Stevenarella had no Packet::PlayBlockChangedAckClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound block_changed_ack surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00, minecraft:add_entity / 0x01, minecraft:animate / 0x02, and minecraft:award_stats / 0x03, but not minecraft:block_changed_ack / 0x04.

play_clientbound_block_changed_ack.official_fixture: official ClientboundBlockChangedAckPacket sequence constructor fixture; no initialized Minecraft/game state
play_clientbound_block_changed_ack.official_body_shape: sequence encoded as one FriendlyByteBuf VarInt

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundBlockChangedAckPacket(int), ClientboundBlockChangedAckPacket.STREAM_CODEC, FriendlyByteBuf.readVarInt/writeVarInt, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(...).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleBlockChangedAck(ClientboundBlockChangedAckPacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound block_changed_ack dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter, 0x01 add_entity, 0x02 animate, and 0x03 award_stats, but not official packet id 0x04 block_changed_ack.
Current Packet enum has no Play block_changed_ack packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 sequence body fixture.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayBlockChangedAckClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
